_meta.description: Curated knowledge base of common OR problem families. Keys are lowercase canonical tags; aliases are matched case-insensitively.
_meta.schema: canonical_name, aliases[], complexity, exact_methods[], heuristic_methods[], metaheuristic_methods[], typical_parameters{}, key_pitfalls[], references[]

heuristic_methods: Greedy by value/weight ratio (sort descending, pack until full)
metaheuristic_methods: GA with binary vector encoding + repair operator
key_pitfalls: Ratio-greedy is not optimal — use DP for exact
Must enforce capacity in every mutation/crossover
Watch integer overflow for large W
references: Martello & Toth (1990) — Knapsack Problems: Algorithms and Computer Implementations

key_pitfalls: All dimensions must fit simultaneously
Repair infeasible offspring after crossover

exact_methods: MILP with MTZ or DFJ subtour elimination
metaheuristic_methods: GA with order crossover (OX) + 2-opt local search
Simulated annealing with 2-opt or or-opt moves
key_pitfalls: Always apply 2-opt as local search inside any metaheuristic
Watch for asymmetric vs symmetric distance
Represent tour as permutation, not adjacency list
references: Applegate, Bixby, Chvatal, Cook (2006) — The TSP: A Computational Study

exact_methods: MILP with commodity flow formulation (small n)
metaheuristic_methods: GA with route-based encoding + split procedure
key_pitfalls: Capacity per vehicle must be respected
Depot must appear at start and end of each route
Total distance = sum over routes
references: Toth & Vigo (2014) — Vehicle Routing: Problems, Methods, and Applications

key_pitfalls: Always sort items descending by size first
Watch floating-point capacity comparisons

heuristic_methods: Greedy (pick set covering most uncovered elements per cost, ln(n)-approx)
key_pitfalls: Greedy is ln(n)-approximate, not optimal
Ensure every element is covered after repair
Makespan = max completion time across all jobs
Precedence within a job must be respected
Operation-based encoding is easier than start-time encoding
references: Pinedo (2016) — Scheduling: Theory, Algorithms, and Systems

key_pitfalls: All jobs visit machines in same order (permutation)
NEH is usually the best single-shot heuristic
references: Ruiz & Maroto (2005) — A comprehensive review and evaluation of permutation flowshop heuristics

heuristic_methods: Greedy (sort pairs by cost, assign feasibly)
key_pitfalls: Use scipy.optimize.linear_sum_assignment — don't write GA for this
Minimization by default; negate cost for maximization
Use networkx.maximum_flow or scipy
Handle capacity=0 edges
Use networkx.min_cost_flow or scipy.sparse.csgraph
Supply+demand must balance
Each customer assigned to exactly one open facility
Fixed-cost + transport-cost tradeoff
references: Drezner & Hamacher (2002) — Facility Location: Applications and Theory

exact_methods: MILP with start-time or time-indexed variables
key_pitfalls: For RCPSP strongly prefer ortools CP-SAT when available
Respect precedence AND resource capacity at each time

heuristic_methods: Not applicable — LP is exactly solvable in poly time
key_pitfalls: Do NOT write a GA for pure LP — use scipy.linprog or pulp
Check for unboundedness / infeasibility status codes

exact_methods: Branch-and-cut (CBC via PuLP, HiGHS via scipy>=1.9, ortools CP-SAT for pure IP)
MILP formulation in PuLP or Pyomo
metaheuristic_methods: Large-scale neighborhood search around LP relaxation
key_pitfalls: Always try the MILP solver first before metaheuristics — CBC/HiGHS are free and usually fast enough
Binary vs general integer must be declared correctly

nlp.complexity: Convex NLP: polynomial. Non-convex NLP: NP-hard
heuristic_methods: Multi-start local search with random restarts
key_pitfalls: If objective/constraints are convex, use cvxpy or scipy — not GA
Provide good bounds to accelerate DE/PSO
Handle constraint violations via penalty or repair
DSATUR is usually a strong starting heuristic
Symmetry: color labels are interchangeable — use partition representation
references: Galinier & Hertz (2006) — A survey of local search methods for graph coloring
